title: Wimmerella hederacea
taxonomy: Wimmerella hederacea is classified in the family Melastomataceae. It belongs to the genus Wimmerella. This plant is native to South America and is also known as the ivy melastome. Wimmerella hederacea is an evergreen shrub or vine that produces white or pink flowers. It is a relatively rare species that is not as widely known as some of the other plants in its family.
